human_verification.notes: Reviewed validated readiness for property intake and leasing prerequisite validation, HUD occupancy and voucher specificity, fair housing and FCRA boundaries, functionality coverage, research summary, and runtime-specification-based posture.

specialist_owned_evidence: Manifest enforces housing and leasing intake boundaries for application records, tenant selection plans, waitlists, identity, household, income, screening authorization, FCRA handling, fair housing flags, voucher lease-up packets, LIHTC evidence, unit inspection, lease package, and move-in access prerequisites.

Research summary maps workflow stages, artifacts, systems of record, decision boundaries, domain failure modes, required source classes, required scenario families, queue-level must-pass families, and non-blocking ambiguity handling.

review_notes: No functional or evidence blockers remain for this package draft.

Scenario coverage includes normal affordable-unit intake, missing prerequisites, incomplete application artifacts, wrong-lane routing, screening authorization bypass refusal, voucher lease-up blockers, LIHTC evidence gaps, fair housing or legal overreach, public housing admission gaps, move-in access blockers, conflicting policies, and tenant adaptation.
